name: CNMC Goldmine Holdings Limited
summary: CNMC Goldmine Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the exploration, development, mining, and marketing of gold in Malaysia. The company also explores for silver, iron, feldspar, lead, and zinc deposits. Its flagship project is the Sokor Gold Field project, which covers an area of 2,370 acres located in the district of Tanah Merah, Kelantan. The company also provides drilling and non-mining related services, as well as offers underground mining services. CNMC Goldmine Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Singapore.
